title: PQF Dimensions Config
description: Schema for config/dimensions.yaml — defines all quality dimensions, their output metrics, and medal rubrics.

dimensions.description: Map of dimension IDs to dimension definitions. Keys must be snake_case.

label.description: Human-readable dimension name shown in the UI.

description.description: One-sentence description of what this dimension measures.

scorer.description: Relative path to the scorer entry point, e.g. scorers/test_verification/scorer.py

outputs.description: Map of metric keys to their metadata. Keys must be snake_case.

type.description: Value type produced by the scorer for this metric.

label.description: Short human-readable name shown in the UI metrics table.

description.description: What this metric measures and how it is computed.

range.description: Optional description of valid value range, e.g. '0–100' or '≥ 0 days'. Required for number types.

ai_assisted.description: If true, the metric is evaluated by an LLM via OpenRouter rather than deterministic code. Shown with a ✦ AI badge in the UI.

MedalRubric.description: Medal tier criteria. Each tier is a list of criterion expressions that must ALL pass. Tiers are cumulative (gold implies silver implies bronze).

CriteriaList.description: List of criterion expressions. Each must be of the form '<metric_key> <operator> <value>', e.g. 'coverage_pct >= 70' or 'latest_build_passing == true'.
